commands.review_summary:
The PR moves built-in agent-core harness custom message types into the shared types export and expands tsdown pre-cleaning to package output directories with a focused regression test.

PR surface: Source +7, Tests +4, Other +7. Total +18 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection rather than a local rerun: current main invokes tsdown with --no-clean while only pre-cleaning root dist outputs, and current harness messages use the relative declaration augmentation the PR says produced the dts warning.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The remaining blocker is maintainer compatibility acceptance for the exported agent-core type surface, not a narrow automated code repair.

target.title: fix(build): avoid stale agent-core dts warnings
target.body:
## Summary
- Move built-in agent-core harness custom message types into `types.ts` and re-export them from `harness/messages.ts` so the generated declaration bundle no longer contains a relative `declare module "../types.js"` augmentation.
- Clean package tsdown output roots before invoking tsdown with `--no-clean`, preventing stale package declaration chunks from surviving between builds.

## Validation
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --check scripts/tsdown-build.mjs test/scripts/tsdown-build.test.ts packages/agent-core/src/types.ts packages/agent-core/src/harness/messages.ts`
- `pnpm test test/scripts/tsdown-build.test.ts`
- `pnpm tsgo:core`
- `/usr/bin/time -f '[local] tsdown-build elapsed=%E maxrss=%MKB' env OPENCLAW_TSDOWN_HEARTBEAT_MS=30000 node scripts/tsdown-build.mjs` passed in `9:49.32`; the prior `rolldown-plugin-dts:fake-js` relative module warning did not appear, and rebuilt package dist no longer contains stale `declare module "../types.js"` chunks.
target.author: keshavbotagent
